item.title: Giant Steak Challenge or $100
item.description: A giant steak challenge with a $100 fallback if it’s not finished. Big portions, bold flavor, and a fun food challenge setup.

media:content.media:title: Giant Steak Challenge or $100
media:content.media:description: A giant steak challenge with a $100 fallback if it’s not finished. Big portions, bold flavor, and a fun food challenge setup.

item.title: Cooking the Perfect Meal in the Wilderness
item.description: A wilderness cooking challenge focused on making the perfect meal outdoors, with a simple, nature-filled setup and plenty of flavor.

media:content.media:title: Cooking the Perfect Meal in the Wilderness
media:content.media:description: A wilderness cooking challenge focused on making the perfect meal outdoors, with a simple, nature-filled setup and plenty of flavor.

item.title: Tackling the Giant Tugboat Burger
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring a giant Tugboat Burger, big flavor, and plenty of outdoor-style challenge energy.

media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring a giant Tugboat Burger, big flavor, and plenty of outdoor-style challenge energy.

item.title: Can I Conquer This Monster Meal?
item.description: A fun food challenge centered on a huge meal and the question of whether it can be conquered.

item.title: Me vs This Giant Bucket of Chicken
item.description: A fun food challenge featuring a giant bucket of chicken, plenty of flavor, and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.

media:content.media:title: Me vs This Giant Bucket of Chicken
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge featuring a giant bucket of chicken, plenty of flavor, and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.

item.title: 10 Minutes for a Large Pizza Challenge
item.description: A fun pizza challenge with a large pie and a 10-minute timer. Lighthearted, fast-paced, and all about enjoying a big slice of the action.

media:content.media:title: 10 Minutes for a Large Pizza Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun pizza challenge with a large pie and a 10-minute timer. Lighthearted, fast-paced, and all about enjoying a big slice of the action.
